decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study' exactly matches an existing registry record with the same record_id, project_name ('Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study'), borough (Staten Island), project_type ('transportation improvement study'), and description. The observation already resolves to this canonical identity; no link to a different record is needed. The source evidence (p001_c0004 title slide, p013_c0007 'Step 5: Implement the Project-Target 2013') confirms the same study.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ■ Improve safety for all corridor users ■ Improve traffic flow ■ Reduce bus travel time and improve bus travel time reliability ■ Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to SI destinations ■ Maintain access to Hylan Boulevard businesses
